Font Families

The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog
--font-sans
Subway Sans, Subway Sans Fallback, system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, Segoe UI, sans-serif
The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog
--font-sans-condensed
Subway Sans Condensed, Subway Sans Condensed Fallback, Subway Sans, system-ui, sans-serif
The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog
--font-sans-extended
Subway Sans Extended, Subway Sans Fallback, Subway Sans, system-ui, sans-serif
The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog
--font-mono
SF Mono, Monaco, Inconsolata, Fira Mono, Droid Sans Mono, monospace
The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog
--font-serif
Georgia, Cambria, Times New Roman, Times, serif
